Title: South Wales Barbeques
Short Description: Specialist BBQ and log burner retailer in Cwmbran, offering premium barbecues, stoves, outdoor cooking equipment, fuels and accessories with expert advice and friendly local service.
About Us:
At South Wales Barbeques, we're passionate about helping people make the most of outdoor cooking. Whether you're a seasoned BBQ enthusiast or buying your very first grill, our knowledgeable team is committed to providing expert advice, quality products and outstanding customer service every step of the way.

Based in Cwmbran, we are one of South Wales' leading specialist barbecue retailers, offering an extensive range of premium gas, charcoal, pellet and electric barbecues from trusted brands, alongside a huge selection of accessories, fuels, cookware and outdoor cooking essentials.

We believe that a barbecue is more than just a way to cook – it's about bringing family and friends together to create memorable experiences. That's why we carefully select products that combine exceptional performance, durability and value, ensuring our customers enjoy years of outdoor cooking.

Our experienced team takes pride in offering honest, practical advice to help you choose the right barbecue for your garden, lifestyle and budget. From expert product recommendations to after-sales support, we're dedicated to making every customer's experience enjoyable and stress-free.

In addition to supplying market-leading barbecue brands, we also host BBQ cooking demonstrations and workshops, giving customers the opportunity to develop new skills, learn professional techniques and get the very best from their equipment.

Whether you're looking for a compact grill for family meals, a premium outdoor kitchen or the latest barbecue accessories, South Wales Barbeques is your trusted local destination for everything outdoor cooking.

**Expert Advice. Premium Brands. Exceptional Outdoor Cooking.**

Visit our showroom in Cwmbran or shop online with confidence.
Services: Barbecues, BBQ accessories, Log burners, Wood-burning stoves, Outdoor cooking equipment, Fuels and charcoal, Firewood, Expert product advice
Address: Unit 28, Court Road Industrial Estate, Cwmbran, NP44 3AS
